vulnerability.reference: Fine-tuning APIs overlook encoded malicious prompts, allowing harmful behaviors to slip past safety mechanisms.
vulnerability.generated: End-users lack the means to detect or filter encoded harmful outputs because they depend on provider safety mechanisms that covert fine-tuning evades.

impact.reference: End-users exposed to harmful outputs may suffer emotional distress and propagate misinformation.
impact.generated: End-users are exposed to and may act on covert harmful instructions, leading to misinformation, security breaches, and physical harm.

dose_response.reference: Covertly embedding harmful behaviors via fine-tuning with encoded triggers enables end-users to interact with malicious fine-tuned models via API, where safety classifiers overlook encoded prompts, leading to emotional distress and erosion of trust in commercial APIs.
dose_response.generated: Covertly embedding harmful behaviors via fine-tuning that evade safety evaluation, through end-user API interactions, triggers reliance on evaded safety mechanisms, leading to exposure to harmful instructions and consequent misinformation, security breaches, or physical harm.
